processing_log.detail: Attached file parsed; multiple wrapper fragments present; six expected JSON wrappers partially present across file; L3 entries excluded where present.
Normalized apply_url used to detect duplicates across career pages, aggregators, and LinkedIn; duplicates collapsed (Zegna duplicate across L1 career_page, L2 indeed, L2 linkedin).
Applied priority L1 > L2; when L1 lacked non-conflicting fields (holding, posted_date, notes, jd) permitted enrichment from L2.
Conflicts logged with reasons (priority_rule, better_evidence). apply_url canonicalization exception applied for Zegna where L1 canonical used.
Produced consolidated_results array and metrics per orchestration rules.

data_quality_warnings.cause: Missing posted_date on multiple career pages and aggregator entries.
data_quality_warnings.impact: Temporal compliance (≤21 days) cannot be confirmed for some items.
data_quality_warnings.message: posted_date is null for several items (LULULEMON-..., JR124797, R-74673, R-71093, R-60135 and multiple Indeed entries).
data_quality_warnings.recommendation: Retrieve explicit posted_date via authenticated ATS sessions or re-run wrappers with expanded extraction for posted_date.

data_quality_warnings.cause: Workday and several ATS inaccessible during extraction (maintenance/DNS errors).
data_quality_warnings.impact: Potential vacancies from affected tenants are missing from consolidated results.
data_quality_warnings.message: Workday global maintenance and DNS errors prevented access to multiple career pages (e.g., Swarovski, Coty, Dior).
data_quality_warnings.recommendation: Retry extraction after ATS availability window; consider alternative tenant URLs or LinkedIn fallback.

data_quality_warnings.cause: Location strings ambiguous ('Mexico, Mexico' vs explicit CDMX).
data_quality_warnings.impact: CDMX location compliance uncertain for some entries (Richemont JR124797).
data_quality_warnings.message: Some postings use broad location strings requiring manual verification to confirm CDMX base.
data_quality_warnings.recommendation: Verify location on target ATS or via recruiter contact before applying.

data_quality_warnings.cause: Partial JD content due to authenticated career sites (Nike partial JDs).
data_quality_warnings.impact: Signal extraction (visual_signal, innovation_dna) may be incomplete.
data_quality_warnings.message: Nike career pages returned partial JD snippets requiring authenticated access for full job text.
data_quality_warnings.recommendation: Access full JD with authenticated session to re-evaluate signals.

data_quality_warnings.cause: Aggregator entries sometimes lack employer holding field.
data_quality_warnings.impact: Holding may be null for aggregator-only records.
data_quality_warnings.message: Several Indeed entries have holding=null while career page L1 would provide holding if available.
data_quality_warnings.recommendation: Enrich aggregator records from matching career pages when available.

data_quality_warnings.cause: Normalization of apply_url removed query params and trailing slashes; some aggregator canonical links may still differ.
data_quality_warnings.impact: Potential false negatives/positives in dedup if canonical job_id absent.
data_quality_warnings.message: apply_url normalization applied; where L1 URL generic (query-based) L2 canonical with job_id considered better evidence but none detected except Zegna.
data_quality_warnings.recommendation: Where possible prefer URLs containing explicit job identifiers; record provenance in source_records.

data_quality_warnings.cause: Not all six expected JSON wrapper inputs were present as discrete top-level files in the attachment.
data_quality_warnings.impact: Processing continued with available inputs; some wrappers may be missing leading to reduced coverage.
data_quality_warnings.message: Input contained merged wrapper outputs across a single file; exact six separate JSON wrappers not found.
data_quality_warnings.recommendation: Provide the six expected wrapper JSONs separately for full orchestration run.

data_quality_warnings.cause: Some L2 entries suggested reroute candidates; these were consolidated into reroute_candidates_history without modification.
data_quality_warnings.impact: Reroute candidates preserved for downstream routing.
data_quality_warnings.message: Reroute candidate objects unified into reroute_candidates_history unchanged.
data_quality_warnings.recommendation: No action required; downstream router should consume reroute_candidates_history.

data_quality_warnings.cause: LinkedIn posted_date inferred from relative timestamp.
data_quality_warnings.impact: posted_date may have ±1 day deviation for LinkedIn-derived dates.
data_quality_warnings.message: LinkedIn item Zegna posted_date inferred as 2026-07-04 from '4 days ago'.
data_quality_warnings.recommendation: Confirm exact date via ATS or hirer if strict temporal compliance required.

data_quality_warnings.cause: Multiple career sites (Workday tenants) returned HTTP/DNS errors causing incomplete coverage.
data_quality_warnings.impact: High probability of missing active VM vacancies from affected tenants.
data_quality_warnings.message: Critical career sites inaccessible during extraction (Workday maintenance, DNS errors).
data_quality_warnings.recommendation: Re-run extraction after resolving ATS availability; mark this run as partial.

data_quality_warnings.cause: Some source_records preserved raw wrapper provenance strings for auditability.
data_quality_warnings.message: source_records include layer and origin for each consolidated item.
